01 / Practices

Six practices
One operating model
Partner-led

What we do

Six practices.

Each practice is led by a partner with deep, named experience in the field. We do not have a "staff augmentation" model — every engagement is scoped, staffed, and accounted for personally.

02 / The list

Exhibit 01 Practice list

01
Strategy development and planning

Tightly scoped engagements led by a single named partner with weekly checkpoint cadence. Engagements typically run four to six months from kickoff to close-out.

Partner-led
4–6 months
02
Operations improvement and process redesign

Tightly scoped engagements led by a single named partner with weekly checkpoint cadence. Engagements typically run four to six months from kickoff to close-out.

Partner-led
4–6 months
03
Digital transformation advisory

Tightly scoped engagements led by a single named partner with weekly checkpoint cadence. Engagements typically run four to six months from kickoff to close-out.

Partner-led
4–6 months
04
Change management

Tightly scoped engagements led by a single named partner with weekly checkpoint cadence. Engagements typically run four to six months from kickoff to close-out.

Partner-led
4–6 months
05
Government policy and program review

Tightly scoped engagements led by a single named partner with weekly checkpoint cadence. Engagements typically run four to six months from kickoff to close-out.

Partner-led
4–6 months
06
Organisational design

Tightly scoped engagements led by a single named partner with weekly checkpoint cadence. Engagements typically run four to six months from kickoff to close-out.

Partner-led
4–6 months

03 / Method

How engagements run

Three commitments on every engagement.

These are the things that don't change between practices, between client types, and between engagement sizes.

Commitment 01 Partner accountability

1

A single named partner is accountable from kickoff to close-out. Not three. Not "the team." One.

Commitment 02 Weekly cadence

7days

Every engagement has a fixed weekly checkpoint with the partner and the client lead. Slips are visible immediately.

Commitment 03 Tight scope

4–6mo

Most engagements are scoped to a defined question with a defined deliverable. Long-term retainers are the exception, not the rule.

Engage

04 / Get in touch

Have a question that fits Meridian?

Send us a short note about what you're trying to figure out. A partner will respond personally within two business days.

Start a conversation

Meridian Advisory

A boutique management consulting firm based in Perth, working with mid-market and government clients across Western Australia. Founded 2014.
